title: Add Author Section to README
description: Include an 'Author' section in the project's README file to credit the main contributor(s).
details: Open the README.md file in the root directory of the project. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end (or in a logical place, such as after 'License' or 'Contributing'). Include the name(s) and, if appropriate, contact information or GitHub profile links of the author(s) as per project conventions.
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md file to ensure the 'Author' section is present, formatted consistently with the rest of the document, and contains accurate author information. Optionally, preview the file in a markdown viewer to confirm correct rendering.
